## Summary

- 

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run deployment:check`
- [ ] `npm run strategy:iterate`
- [ ] `npm run ci:open-source`
- [ ] UI screenshots or browser notes, if UI changed
- [ ] Runner receipt/evidence/audit paths, if automation or external runner behavior changed

## Deployment / Commercial Impact

- [ ] No deployment impact
- [ ] Self-host preview docs or runtime config updated
- [ ] Commercial boundary, license notice, or customer-facing docs updated

## Safety Boundary

- [ ] No raw API keys, tokens, cookies, private logs, or host secrets committed
- [ ] No new push, deploy, desktop, browser, external-send, or destructive action without policy checks and approval notes
- [ ] Claims distinguish dry-run, fixture, wrapper-kit, and real external-runner evidence
